title: Maldives Luxury Escape
short_tagline: Private Water Villas & Crystal Clear Waters
overview: Experience the epitome of luxury in the Maldives. Stay in a private overwater bungalow, wake up to panoramic Indian Ocean views, and enjoy private dining under the stars.
highlights: Stay in a Premium Overwater Villa
Private Sunset Cruise with Champagne
Underwater dining experience at Ithaa
Rejuvenating couples spa therapy

day_wise_itinerary.title: Arrival in Paradise
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive at Male International Airport. VIP lounge access before boarding a scenic seaplane to your private island resort.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Ocean Views & Spa
day_wise_itinerary.description: Wake up to breakfast served in your private pool. Afternoon signature couple's massage at the overwater spa.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Underwater Dining
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning at leisure. Evening dinner at an exclusive underwater restaurant surrounded by vibrant marine life.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Sunset Cruise
day_wise_itinerary.description: Enjoy water activities during the day. In the evening, embark on a private luxury yacht for a sunset cruise with champagne and canapés.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Farewell Maldives
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning yoga on the deck. Check out and take the seaplane back to Male for your onward journey.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa for the Maldives?
faqs.answer: The Maldives offers a 30-day visa on arrival for all nationalities.

faqs.question: Are seaplane transfers included?
faqs.answer: Yes, round-trip seaplane transfers from Male are included in the package.

seo_title: Maldives Luxury Escape - Premium Honeymoon Package | Voyastra
seo_description: Book a 5-day luxury escape to the Maldives. Enjoy private overwater villas, underwater dining, and sunset cruises with Voyastra.

title: Swiss Alps Panorama
best_time_to_visit: June to September (Summer) / December to March (Winter)
overview: A breathtaking journey through the Swiss Alps. Ride the famous Glacier Express, witness the mighty Matterhorn, and stay in heritage luxury hotels.
highlights: First Class tickets on the Glacier Express
Views of the iconic Matterhorn
Gourmet Swiss fondue experience
Luxury stays in Zermatt and St. Moritz

day_wise_itinerary.title: Welcome to Zurich
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive in Zurich. Private transfer to your luxury hotel. Evening walk along Lake Zurich.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Journey to Zermatt
day_wise_itinerary.description: Take a 1st Class train to Zermatt. Enjoy the car-free Alpine village and check into your mountain-view suite.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Matterhorn Glacier Paradise
day_wise_itinerary.description: Ascend to the highest cable car station in Europe. Experience the Ice Palace and panoramic Alpine views.

day_wise_itinerary.title: The Glacier Express
day_wise_itinerary.description: Board the world-famous Glacier Express to St. Moritz. A 8-hour journey through spectacular valleys and over 291 bridges.

day_wise_itinerary.title: St. Moritz Elegance
day_wise_itinerary.description: Explore the glitzy resort town of St. Moritz. Enjoy high tea at a heritage hotel overlooking the lake.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Bernina Express Excursion
day_wise_itinerary.description: A day trip on the Bernina Express, a UNESCO World Heritage railway crossing the Alps into Italy.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Departure
day_wise_itinerary.description: Train transfer back to Zurich airport for your onward flight.

faqs.question: Is the Swiss Travel Pass included?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 1st Class Swiss Travel Pass is included for seamless travel.

faqs.question: Will we see snow in summer?
faqs.answer: Yes, high-altitude excursions like Matterhorn Glacier Paradise have snow year-round.

seo_title: Swiss Alps Panorama - Glacier Express & Matterhorn | Voyastra
seo_description: Experience the ultimate Swiss luxury tour with Glacier Express 1st class, Zermatt, and St. Moritz. Premium travel by Voyastra.

title: Royal Rajasthan Odyssey
overview: Live like royalty in the land of Maharajas. Stay in authentic palace hotels, explore majestic forts, and experience a luxury camp in the Thar Desert.
highlights: Stay at the iconic Taj Lake Palace
Private boat ride on Lake Pichola
Exclusive dining at Umaid Bhawan Palace
Luxury glamping in the Thar Desert

day_wise_itinerary.title: Arrival in Udaipur
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive in Udaipur. Transfer by boat to Taj Lake Palace. Evening sunset cruise on Lake Pichola.

day_wise_itinerary.title: City of Lakes
day_wise_itinerary.description: Guided tour of the City Palace and Crystal Gallery. Evening High Tea at Jagmandir Island.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Journey to Jodhpur
day_wise_itinerary.description: Drive to Jodhpur. Check into Umaid Bhawan Palace. Evening at leisure to enjoy palace amenities.

day_wise_itinerary.title: The Blue City
day_wise_itinerary.description: Explore Mehrangarh Fort with a royal curator. Walk through the blue alleys of the old city.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Into the Desert
day_wise_itinerary.description: Drive to Jaisalmer. Check into a luxury desert camp. Evening camel safari and folk dance performances.

day_wise_itinerary.title: The Golden Fort
day_wise_itinerary.description: Explore Jaisalmer Fort, the only living fort in India. Visit ancient Havelis and local markets.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Farewell Dinner
day_wise_itinerary.description: Return to Jodhpur. Enjoy an exclusive private dinner with views of Mehrangarh Fort.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Departure
day_wise_itinerary.description: Transfer to Jodhpur airport for your flight back home.

faqs.question: Are transfers between cities included?
faqs.answer: Yes, you will have a dedicated luxury SUV and chauffeur for the entire trip.

faqs.question: Is the desert camp safe and comfortable?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. It is a premium glamping experience with ensuite bathrooms and luxury amenities.

seo_title: Royal Rajasthan Odyssey - Luxury Palace Tour | Voyastra
seo_description: Explore Udaipur, Jodhpur, and Jaisalmer in ultimate luxury. Stay at Taj Lake Palace and Umaid Bhawan with Voyastra.

title: Bali Spiritual Retreat
overview: Discover the magic of Bali. Unwind in a private pool villa amidst Ubud's jungles, then head to the stunning cliffs of Uluwatu for dramatic ocean sunsets.
highlights: Private Pool Villa in Ubud
Floating breakfast experience
Exclusive access to Sundays Beach Club
Kecak fire dance at Uluwatu Temple

day_wise_itinerary.title: Welcome to Ubud
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive at Denpasar. Private transfer to your jungle resort in Ubud. Relax in your private pool.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Cultural Ubud
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning floating breakfast. Visit the Sacred Monkey Forest and Tegallalang Rice Terraces.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Spa & Transfer to Uluwatu
day_wise_itinerary.description: Enjoy a traditional Balinese massage. Afternoon transfer to a cliffside luxury resort in Uluwatu.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Cliffs & Fire Dance
day_wise_itinerary.description: Relax at the resort. Evening visit to Uluwatu Temple to watch the sunset and traditional Kecak Fire Dance.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Beach Club VIP
day_wise_itinerary.description: Spend the day at an exclusive beach club with VIP cabana access and water sports.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Farewell Bali
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning shopping in Seminyak before your private transfer to the airport.

faqs.question: Do Indians need a visa for Bali?
faqs.answer: Yes, Indians can get a Visa on Arrival in Bali.

faqs.question: Is the floating breakfast vegetarian-friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes, all meals can be customized to dietary preferences.

seo_title: Bali Luxury Retreat - Ubud & Uluwatu Packages | Voyastra
seo_description: Book a premium Bali vacation. Private pool villas, floating breakfasts, and Uluwatu cliffside luxury.

title: Dubai Desert Opulence
overview: Experience the glamour of Dubai. Stay at the iconic Atlantis The Palm, enjoy VIP desert safaris, and dine with views of the Burj Khalifa.
highlights: Stay at Atlantis The Palm
VIP Premium Desert Safari
At The Top - Burj Khalifa Sky Lounge
Luxury Yacht Tour of Dubai Marina

day_wise_itinerary.title: Arrive in Dubai
day_wise_itinerary.description: Chauffeur pick-up from DXB. Check into Atlantis The Palm. Evening at leisure at The Pointe.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Old & New Dubai
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning tour of Al Fahidi and Gold Souk. Afternoon visit to Burj Khalifa Level 148 Sky Lounge.

day_wise_itinerary.title: VIP Desert Safari
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning relax at Aquaventure Waterpark. Late afternoon premium desert safari in a Range Rover with private dining.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Yacht Life
day_wise_itinerary.description: Charter a luxury yacht from Dubai Marina. Cruise past Bluewaters Island and Burj Al Arab.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Shopping & Departure
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning shopping at Dubai Mall. Afternoon transfer to the airport.

faqs.question: Are waterpark tickets included?
faqs.answer: Yes, unlimited access to Aquaventure is included when staying at Atlantis.

faqs.question: What is the baggage allowance for the transfers?
faqs.answer: Our luxury SUVs accommodate standard baggage limits comfortably.

seo_title: Dubai Luxury Opulence - VIP Tours & Atlantis Stay | Voyastra
seo_description: Experience Dubai's ultimate luxury. Atlantis The Palm, VIP desert safari, and Burj Khalifa Sky access.

title: Kashmir Paradise Unveiled
best_time_to_visit: March to August / December to February for snow
overview: A pristine journey through 'Heaven on Earth'. Stay in a luxury houseboat on Dal Lake and premium resorts in Gulmarg and Pahalgam.
highlights: Stay in a Luxury Heritage Houseboat
Shikara ride during sunset on Dal Lake
Gondola ride to Apharwat Peak in Gulmarg
Premium resort stay in Pahalgam

day_wise_itinerary.title: Srinagar Arrival
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive in Srinagar. Check into a Luxury Houseboat on Nigeen Lake. Evening Shikara ride.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Gulmarg Excursion
day_wise_itinerary.description: Drive to Gulmarg. Check into Khyber Resort. Enjoy the majestic Himalayan views.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Gondola Heights
day_wise_itinerary.description: Experience the highest cable car in the world. Ascend to Phase 2 for snow activities.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Journey to Pahalgam
day_wise_itinerary.description: Drive to Pahalgam, the Valley of Shepherds. Visit saffron fields and Awantipora ruins en route.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Betaab Valley
day_wise_itinerary.description: Excursion to Betaab Valley, Aru Valley, and Chandanwari. Evening by the Lidder River.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Departure
day_wise_itinerary.description: Drive back to Srinagar airport for departure.

faqs.question: Is Kashmir safe for tourists?
faqs.answer: Yes, tourist zones in Kashmir are very safe and heavily monitored for traveler security.

faqs.question: Are the houseboats heated?
faqs.answer: Yes, luxury houseboats have centralized heating systems for winter months.

seo_title: Kashmir Luxury Package - Gulmarg & Pahalgam | Voyastra
seo_description: Book a premium Kashmir tour. Luxury houseboats, Khyber Resort Gulmarg, and scenic Pahalgam valleys.

title: Santorini Aegean Dream
overview: The ultimate romantic getaway. Stay in a luxury cave suite with a private plunge pool overlooking the caldera.
highlights: Cave Suite with Infinity Plunge Pool
Private Catamaran Sunset Cruise
Wine tasting at a volcanic vineyard
Professional Photoshoot in Oia

day_wise_itinerary.title: Arrival in Santorini
day_wise_itinerary.description: Private transfer to Oia. Check into your luxury caldera-view suite. Evening dinner overlooking the Aegean Sea.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Oia & Photoshoot
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning 2-hour professional 'flying dress' photoshoot in Oia. Afternoon at leisure in your private pool.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Catamaran Cruise
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning visit to Fira. Afternoon board a luxury catamaran. Sail past the Red Beach and enjoy sunset dinner on board.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Volcanic Wines
day_wise_itinerary.description: Private wine tasting tour of Santorini's unique volcanic vineyards, including Santo Wines with caldera views.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Departure
day_wise_itinerary.description: Enjoy a final Greek breakfast before your private transfer to the airport.

faqs.question: Are the pools heated?
faqs.answer: Yes, private plunge pools in luxury suites are heated.

faqs.question: Is the catamaran cruise private?
faqs.answer: It is a semi-private luxury cruise (max 10-12 people). A fully private charter is available as an upgrade.

seo_title: Santorini Luxury Honeymoon - Cave Suites & Caldera Views
seo_description: Stay in Oia's finest cave suites. Premium Santorini honeymoon packages featuring private pools and catamaran cruises.

title: Paris Romance & Elegance
best_time_to_visit: April to June / September to October
overview: Experience the City of Light in unparalleled luxury. Stay steps away from the Champs-Élysées, dine at the Eiffel Tower, and enjoy private art tours.
highlights: Stay in a luxury Palace-status hotel
VIP Dinner at Le Jules Verne (Eiffel Tower)
Private Louvre tour with an art historian
Seine River private yacht cruise

day_wise_itinerary.title: Bienvenue à Paris
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive at CDG Airport. Chauffeur transfer to your hotel. Evening VIP dinner cruise on the Seine.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Louvre & Fashion
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning private tour of the Louvre. Afternoon personal shopping experience at Galeries Lafayette.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Eiffel Tower Dining
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning tour of Montmartre. Evening Michelin-starred dinner at Le Jules Verne inside the Eiffel Tower.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Versailles Excursion
day_wise_itinerary.description: Half-day private trip to the Palace of Versailles with skip-the-line access to the King's Grand Apartments.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Au Revoir
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning macaron making class. Afternoon transfer to the airport.

faqs.question: How far in advance should we book?
faqs.answer: For Le Jules Verne reservations, booking at least 3 months in advance is required.

faqs.question: Is the Louvre tour private?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is a private tour tailored to your artistic interests.

seo_title: Paris Luxury Travel - 5-Star Hotels & VIP Eiffel Dining
seo_description: Discover Paris in ultimate style. Stay at Palace-status hotels and enjoy private Seine yacht cruises with Voyastra.

title: Japan Zen Discovery
best_time_to_visit: March to May (Cherry Blossoms) / September to November
overview: A seamless blend of ancient traditions and ultra-modern luxury. Travel via Green Car Shinkansen, stay in premium Ryokans, and experience a private tea ceremony.
highlights: Stay in a luxury Ryokan with private Onsen
First Class (Green Car) Bullet Train travel
Private Geisha dinner in Kyoto
Helicopter tour over Mount Fuji

day_wise_itinerary.title: Tokyo Neon Nights
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive in Tokyo. Transfer to your luxury high-rise hotel. Evening omakase sushi dinner.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Tokyo Highlights
day_wise_itinerary.description: Private tour of Meiji Shrine, Shibuya Crossing, and the ultra-modern teamLab Planets exhibition.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Hakone & Mt Fuji
day_wise_itinerary.description: Travel to Hakone. Take a scenic helicopter flight near Mt Fuji. Check into a premium Ryokan.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Onsen & Kaiseki
day_wise_itinerary.description: Relax in your private open-air hot spring bath (Onsen). Enjoy a multi-course traditional Kaiseki dinner.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Bullet Train to Kyoto
day_wise_itinerary.description: Board the Shinkansen (Green Car) to Kyoto. Afternoon visit to the Golden Pavilion (Kinkaku-ji).

day_wise_itinerary.title: Kyoto Heritage
day_wise_itinerary.description: Early access to Arashiyama Bamboo Grove and Fushimi Inari Shrine. Evening private tea ceremony.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Geisha District
day_wise_itinerary.description: Explore the Gion district. Exclusive private dinner accompanied by a Maiko (apprentice Geisha) performance.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Return to Tokyo
day_wise_itinerary.description: Shinkansen back to Tokyo. Last-minute luxury shopping in Ginza.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Sayonara
day_wise_itinerary.description: Transfer to Narita/Haneda airport for departure.

faqs.question: Are tattoos allowed in the Onsen?
faqs.answer: Public onsens usually prohibit tattoos, but your private Ryokan room has its own onsen where tattoos are fine.

faqs.question: Is English widely spoken?
faqs.answer: You will have a private English-speaking guide for all major excursions.

seo_title: Premium Japan Tour - Tokyo, Kyoto & Hakone Luxury Travel
seo_description: Discover Japan in luxury. Stay in high-end Ryokans, travel 1st class via Shinkansen, and dine with Geishas in Kyoto.

title: Thailand Island Sanctuary
overview: Escape to the luxurious islands of Thailand. Unwind in ultra-luxury pool villas overlooking the Andaman Sea and the Gulf of Thailand.
highlights: Stay in a Pool Villa at Keemala
Private Yacht Charter to Phi Phi Islands
Authentic Thai Cooking Class
Holistic Wellness Therapies

day_wise_itinerary.title: Phuket Arrival
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive in Phuket. VIP Fast Track immigration. Check into your Bird's Nest Pool Villa at Keemala.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Phang Nga Bay
day_wise_itinerary.description: Private luxury speedboat tour of Phang Nga Bay, James Bond Island, and sea cave canoeing.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Wellness & Spa
day_wise_itinerary.description: Enjoy a holistic 3-hour Thai spa therapy. Afternoon at leisure.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Fly to Koh Samui
day_wise_itinerary.description: Private transfer to the airport for a short flight to Koh Samui. Check into your beachfront villa.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Private Yacht & Snorkeling
day_wise_itinerary.description: Charter a private catamaran to Ang Thong Marine Park. Snorkeling and private beach BBQ.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Thai Gastronomy
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning private Thai cooking class with a Master Chef. Evening beachfront farewell dinner.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Departure
day_wise_itinerary.description: Transfer to Samui airport for your flight home.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa for Thailand?
faqs.answer: Thailand often offers Visa on Arrival or Visa Exemption for Indian citizens depending on current policies.

faqs.question: Are the domestic flights included?
faqs.answer: Yes, the direct flight from Phuket to Koh Samui is included.

seo_title: Thailand Luxury Beach Vacation - Phuket & Koh Samui
seo_description: Premium Thailand island sanctuary. Stay in private pool villas, enjoy private yacht charters to Phi Phi, and luxury spa therapies.

title: Singapore Urban Luxury
overview: A short but incredibly sweet dive into the future. Stay at the Marina Bay Sands, dine at world-class restaurants, and experience VIP access to major attractions.
highlights: Stay at Marina Bay Sands with Infinity Pool Access
VIP Tour of Gardens by the Bay
Michelin Star Dining Experience
Private Night Safari Tour

day_wise_itinerary.title: Welcome to the Future
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive at Changi Airport. Transfer to Marina Bay Sands. Access the exclusive rooftop infinity pool.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Gardens & Skyline
day_wise_itinerary.description: VIP guided tour of the Cloud Forest and Flower Dome. Evening dinner at a Michelin-starred restaurant.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Sentosa & Night Safari
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning VIP access to Universal Studios Sentosa. Evening private buggy tour of the Night Safari.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Changi Jewel & Departure
day_wise_itinerary.description: Checkout and transfer to Changi Airport. Explore the stunning Jewel Waterfall before departure.

faqs.question: Can non-guests use the MBS Infinity Pool?
faqs.answer: No, the infinity pool is strictly for hotel guests, which is why your stay includes it.

faqs.question: Is the Night Safari private?
faqs.answer: Yes, you will have a private buggy and guide for the Night Safari.

seo_title: Singapore Urban Luxury Tour - Marina Bay Sands Packages
seo_description: Book a premium 4-day Singapore tour. Stay at Marina Bay Sands, experience VIP Universal Studios, and dine at Michelin restaurants.

title: Goa Portuguese Villas
overview: Experience the susegad lifestyle in absolute luxury. Stay in meticulously restored Portuguese heritage villas and enjoy private beach cabanas.
highlights: Stay in a Private Heritage Portuguese Villa
Exclusive Yacht Charter at Sunset
Feni Tasting & Culinary Tour
VIP Beach Club Access

day_wise_itinerary.title: Arrival in Goa
day_wise_itinerary.description: Arrive at Dabolim/Mopa. Transfer to your luxury heritage villa. Relax by your private pool.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Heritage & Cuisine
day_wise_itinerary.description: Private guided tour of Old Goa churches. Afternoon traditional Goan-Portuguese culinary masterclass.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Beach Club VIP
day_wise_itinerary.description: Spend the day at an exclusive beach club in Ashwem or Vagator with reserved VIP cabanas.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Sunset Yacht Cruise
day_wise_itinerary.description: Morning at leisure. Late afternoon board a luxury yacht for a sunset cruise on the Mandovi River.

day_wise_itinerary.title: Departure
day_wise_itinerary.description: Enjoy breakfast prepared by your private chef before transferring to the airport.

faqs.question: Does the villa have staff?
faqs.answer: Yes, your heritage villa comes with a private butler, chef, and housekeeping staff.

faqs.question: Are the beaches private?
faqs.answer: All beaches in India are public, but your hotel/club provides exclusive restricted access areas with cabanas.

seo_title: Goa Luxury Heritage Tour - Portuguese Villas & Private Yachts
seo_description: Discover Goa in ultimate privacy. Stay in luxury Portuguese heritage villas, enjoy VIP beach clubs, and sunset yacht charters.
